title: We Returned Changed Men: A Veteran’s Story of Hope, Healing, Camaraderie
summary: We Returned Changed Men: A Veteran’s Story of Hope, Healing, Camaraderie By Family Wellness Warriors Learning and Development Associate Jean-Paul Roulet SCF Family Wellness Warriors Learning and Development Associate Jean-Paul Roulet and his family on a walk. I am a combat veteran and Tlingit from Southeast Alaska. In 2006, I deployed for 15 months...

title: BSNC Welcomes the 2022 Summer Interns
summary: BSNC welcomes Amber Ongtowasruk as an HR intern. She recently graduated from AVTEC in Seward where she received Accounting Specialist and Administrative Assistant certificates. After her internship, she plans to continue working towards a bachelor’s degree in Accounting. Ongtowasruk’s traditional name is Ublugiaq. She is from Wales and Nome. Her parents are Ron and Gerri...

title: How to Run for Local Office Workshop June 25, 2022 (Deadline to Register 6/16/22)
summary: This October, Juneau voters will elect 3 Assembly members and 2 School Board members.
